text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One key use is text understanding, where computers can read and interpret written information, like summarizing long articles. Another important application is translation, such as converting a paragraph from Spanish to English. NLP also powers sentiment analysis, which detects emotions in text—for example, finding out if a product review is positive or negative. Finally, chatbots use NLP to have conversations with people, answering questions or providing customer support in a natural way. These systems are becoming common in daily life, from smartphone assistants to email filters.
